description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story office building with a flat roof and a brick exterior. The front facade features a combination of large display windows, a recessed entryway, and several smaller windows, suggesting a ground-floor commercial space and upper-floor offices. The side and rear walls are more utilitarian, with regularly spaced windows and minimal ornamentation. A small awning covers one of the front windows, adding a touch of visual interest and shade. The roof is simple, with a single vent or chimney visible. The overall design is functional and typical of mid-20th-century urban commercial architecture.
description: A two-story brick office building with a flat roof, large front windows, and a recessed entryway, featuring a utilitarian and functional urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large display window, and a small awning.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a long, unbroken brick wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade and a few small windows, minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing multiple regularly spaced windows and a secondary entrance.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced rectangular windows in horizontal rows, with larger display windows on the ground floor front facade.
